permissionGroupsDescription: Permission groups and their permission counts from the UTS API are displayed here.
createPermissionGroupDescription: Define a new permission group. Permissions can be assigned in the next step.
noPermissionDefinitionsFound: No selectable permission definitions were found.
deletePermissionGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{name}}" permission group?
permissionGroupInUseDeleteBlocked: This permission group cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a user.
systemPermissionGroupDeleteBlocked: System permission groups cannot be deleted.
